fields.Name: Model Development Agent - Main Prompt
fields.Description: System prompt for the Model Development Agent — the conversational Loop orchestrator that collaborates with a business user to build a strongly-typed ModelingPlanSpec, gates on approval, drives the deterministic experiment session, enforces the leakage warn/sign-off rule, and authors the ML Experiment Results artifact.

fields.Name: Goal Analyst - Main Prompt
fields.Description: System prompt for the Goal Analyst sub-agent. Refines a fuzzy business goal into a precise target definition (entity, target variable, problem type, success metric, as-of strategy). Writes only the Goal and TargetDefinition slices of the ModelingPlanSpec.

fields.Name: Data Scout - Main Prompt
fields.Description: System prompt for the Data Scout sub-agent. Studies approved MJ: Queries, DBAutoDoc, Agent Notes, and existing approved ML Models to propose candidate sources/features and to flag leakage risks. Writes only the CandidateSources, CandidateFeatures, and LeakageNotes slices of the ModelingPlanSpec; agent-drafted queries land Status='Pending'.

fields.Name: Experiment Designer - Main Prompt
fields.Description: System prompt for the Experiment Designer sub-agent. Proposes a ranked set of experiments (features × algorithms × hyperparameters) with rationale, a validation strategy with a locked holdout, and a proposed budget. Writes only the ProposedExperiments, ValidationStrategy, and ProposedBudget slices of the ModelingPlanSpec.
